lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello there.

lines.speaker: Sil'as Dahcsnu
lines.text: Can't you see that I'm busy here?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh. Sorry, you don't look very busy.

lines.speaker: Sil'as Dahcsnu
lines.text: Don't look busy? I've got a lot of important work to do here.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Really? What do you do?

lines.speaker: Sil'as Dahcsnu
lines.text: That doesn't concern you. What are you doing here anyway?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm not actually sure.

lines.speaker: Sil'as Dahcsnu
lines.text: Hmph! Well I can tell you what you ARE doing.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What's that?

lines.speaker: Sil'as Dahcsnu
lines.text: Wasting my time! Now go away! If you must speak to someone, speak to one of the other monks around here!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm on an important quest!

lines.speaker: Sil'as Dahcsnu
lines.text: Really...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes! Do you want to know what my quest is?

lines.speaker: Sil'as Dahcsnu
lines.text: Let me see...you helped out a trader who in turn asked you to deliver something for him, and then you had to journey to some palace to see someone and they said thanks by sending you somewhere else.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Uhh...

lines.speaker: Sil'as Dahcsnu
lines.text: So, now you've ended up down here, bothering me?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Uh, yes, that's about right.

lines.speaker: Sil'as Dahcsnu
lines.text: Lucky me...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Sorry about that. I'll leave you alone, then.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: None of your business!

lines.speaker: Sil'as Dahcsnu
lines.text: Of course it isn't, but you were the one who came here bothering me! So, unless you want something, be off with you!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I am looking for something.

lines.speaker: Sil'as Dahcsnu
lines.text: And what are you looking for exactly?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: The Chaos Altar, I think.

lines.speaker: Sil'as Dahcsnu
lines.text: Hmph! Well, it's just a bit further down. Now, if you don't mind, I'm very busy here!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm the leader of the Dagon'hai. Bow before me!

lines.speaker: Sil'as Dahcsnu
lines.text: You? Leader of the Dagon'hai? Hah! I've never heard of such rubbish! You call yourself a mage?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm a very powerful mage!

lines.speaker: Sil'as Dahcsnu
lines.text: Really?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes! Be afraid! Be very afraid! Ha ha ha!

lines.speaker: Sil'as Dahcsnu
lines.text: I see. Well then, let's see how you handle this!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Argh! I can't stop [dancing/headbanging/jumping]!

lines.speaker: Sil'as Dahcsnu
lines.text: Hah! I knew you were no mage! Let that be a lesson to you! Now, please leave.

lines.speaker: Sil'as Dahcsnu
lines.text: Argh!

lines.speaker: Sil'as Dahcsnu
lines.text: So! You are a good mage! You deflected my spell.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hah! Yes. I told you so! Now, I have work to be done.

lines.speaker: Sil'as Dahcsnu
lines.text: Of course. Goodbye!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No, you're right. I'm not a mage.

lines.speaker: Sil'as Dahcsnu
lines.text: I didn't think so! Now go away. As I said, I'm very busy!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello.

lines.speaker: Sil'as Dahcsnu
lines.text: Oh, it's you again. What are you doing here?
